column1: # ci-shard-weights.tsv — per-spec partition weights for the time-weighted
# One line per non-module ("core") unit spec. `seconds` is the measured
# kcov-mode runtime rounded to a whole second (>=1). A spec absent here
# falls back to the default weight inside shard_partition.sh, so a brand-new
# spec still gets partitioned until CI records its real time.
# SELF-MAINTAINING + COMMITTED (no CI-only cache; see ADR-0028): refreshed
# from real kcov junit timings via `just -f justfile.ci shard-weights-refresh`
# and committed. Reproducible from the repo — never lives only in the Actions
# cache. Seed below is derived from the audit core total (~432s over 1372
